description:
Six files sit at 293-299 lines, one new line short of failing the pre-commit line-length gate (fails at >=300). Decompose the five that can be split logically, following project_decomposition_convention: lift a cohesive unit into a sibling module and re-export it so callers stay byte-stable. Pure code movement — coverage stays 100% by construction.

- src/store.rs (299) -> move the task-state-branch write methods (commit_task, close_and_archive, all_tasks) into src/store_archive.rs as a second impl Store block. They route through public accessors only, so no field-visibility widening.
- src/state_repo.rs (299) -> move the .balls symlink helpers (ensure_plugins_symlink, ensure_config_symlink, drop_placeholder_plugins_dir, restore_plugins_dir) into src/state_repo_symlinks.rs; pub(crate) use re-export.
- src/participant.rs (298) -> move Field + Projection into src/participant_projection.rs; pub use re-export; move participant_projection_tests to attach there.
- tests/ready_deps.rs (298) -> the link tests accreted onto a ready/dep file; lift them (and the closed_task helper) into tests/links.rs.
- tests/plugin_participant_enforce.rs (293) -> split the close + ctx-channel tests into tests/plugin_participant_enforce_close.rs; hoist the shared jira_policy fixture into common::native_plugin.

src/cli_command.rs (299) is left as-is: it is a single clap Subcommand enum and cannot be split without restructuring the CLI surface. Noted, not decomposed.
title: Decomposition pass: split files riding the 300-line cap
